allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/pdb/products -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"code":"TEST-001","name":"ทดสอบเพิ่มสินค้า","category":"🧵 ผ้า","price":"199","unit":"หลา","status":"active"}')

Bash(node -e "const k=require\('./knexfile'\).development;const db=require\('knex'\)\(k\);db\('products'\).where\('code','TEST-001'\).del\(\).then\(n=>{console.log\('ลบ '+n+' รายการทดสอบ'\);return db.destroy\(\);}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);db.destroy\(\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const knex = require\('knex'\)\({client:'mysql2',connection:{host:'127.0.0.1',port:3306,database:'linsilin_nextjs',user:'root',password:''}}\);knex\('products'\).where\('category','🪡 ผ้าซับBackout-ผ้าซับหลัง'\).where\('supplier','like','%เซน่า%'\).where\('name','like','%P.WOOD%'\).update\({category:'▤ มู่ลี่ไม้',updated_at:knex.fn.now\(\)}\).then\(n=>{console.log\('updated:',n,'rows'\);return knex.destroy\(\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const knex = require\('knex'\)\({client:'mysql2',connection:{host:'127.0.0.1',port:3306,database:'linsilin_nextjs',user:'root',password:''}}\);knex\('products'\).where\('category','🪡 ผ้าซับBackout-ผ้าซับหลัง'\).where\('supplier','like','%เซน่า%'\).where\('name','like','%Foamwood%'\).update\({category:'▤ มู่ลี่ไม้',updated_at:knex.fn.now\(\)}\).then\(n=>{console.log\('updated:',n,'rows'\);return knex.destroy\(\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const knex = require\('knex'\)\({client:'mysql2',connection:{host:'127.0.0.1',port:3306,database:'linsilin_nextjs',user:'root',password:''}}\);knex\('products'\).where\('category','🪡 ผ้าซับBackout-ผ้าซับหลัง'\).where\('supplier','like','%เซน่า%'\).where\('name','like','%FOAM%'\).update\({category:'▤ มู่ลี่ไม้',updated_at:knex.fn.now\(\)}\).then\(n=>{console.log\('updated:',n,'rows'\);return knex.destroy\(\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const knex = require\('knex'\)\({client:'mysql2',connection:{host:'127.0.0.1',port:3306,database:'linsilin_nextjs',user:'root',password:''}}\);knex\('products'\).where\('category','🪡 ผ้าซับBackout-ผ้าซับหลัง'\).where\('supplier','like','%หมอชิต%'\).count\('* as n'\).first\(\).then\(r=>{console.log\('total:',r.n\);return knex.destroy\(\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const knex = require\('knex'\)\({client:'mysql2',connection:{host:'127.0.0.1',port:3306,database:'linsilin_nextjs',user:'root',password:''}}\);knex\('products'\).where\('category','🪡 ผ้าซับBackout-ผ้าซับหลัง'\).where\('supplier','like','%หมอชิต%'\).del\(\).then\(n=>{console.log\('deleted:',n,'rows'\);return knex.destroy\(\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const knex = require\('knex'\)\({client:'mysql2',connection:{host:'127.0.0.1',port:3306,database:'linsilin_nextjs',user:'root',password:''}}\);knex\('products'\).where\('supplier','like','%โยโกแทค%'\).update\({category:'📦 รางม่าน \(แมนนวล\)',updated_at:knex.fn.now\(\)}\).then\(n=>{console.log\('updated:',n,'rows'\);return knex.destroy\(\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const knex = require\('knex'\)\({client:'mysql2',connection:{host:'127.0.0.1',port:3306,database:'linsilin_nextjs',user:'root',password:''}}\);knex\('products'\).where\('category','like','%รางม่าน%แมนนวล%'\).count\('* as n'\).first\(\).then\(r=>{console.log\('count:',r.n\);return knex\('products'\).where\('category','like','%รางม่าน%แมนนวล%'\).select\('category'\).first\(\);}\).then\(r=>{console.log\('exact category:',JSON.stringify\(r\)\);return knex.destroy\(\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const knex = require\('knex'\)\({client:'mysql2',connection:{host:'127.0.0.1',port:3306,database:'linsilin_nextjs',user:'root',password:''}}\);knex\('menu_nodes'\).where\('label','like','%รางม่าน%'\).select\('id','icon','label'\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r,null,2\)\);return knex.destroy\(\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const knex = require\('knex'\)\({client:'mysql2',connection:{host:'127.0.0.1',port:3306,database:'linsilin_nextjs',user:'root',password:''}}\);knex\('products'\).where\('category','▤ มู่ลี่ไม้'\).where\('supplier','like','%ลัคซูรี่%'\).where\('name','like','%กระดุม%'\).update\({category:'📦 รางม่าน \(แมนนวล\) · รางลอน-กระดุม',updated_at:knex.fn.now\(\)}\).then\(n=>{console.log\('updated:',n,'rows'\);return knex.destroy\(\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const knex = require\('knex'\)\({client:'mysql2',connection:{host:'127.0.0.1',port:3306,database:'linsilin_nextjs',user:'root',password:''}}\);knex\('products'\).whereNot\('category','📦 รางม่าน \(แมนนวล\) · รางม่านพับ'\).where\(function\(\){this.where\('name','like','%พับ%'\).orWhere\('code','like','%พับ%'\)}\).update\({category:'📦 รางม่าน \(แมนนวล\) · รางม่านพับ',updated_at:knex.fn.now\(\)}\).then\(n=>{console.log\('updated:',n,'rows'\);return knex.destroy\(\);}\);")
